executiveSummary: Todd, Distinctive Landscape has been serving the Chico area for 35 years -- that kind of longevity builds trust that no amount of advertising can buy. But when I looked at your digital footprint, I found a major disconnect between your real-world reputation and your online presence. Google has only indexed 2 of your 5 website pages. That means 60% of your site is invisible to search engines.

Your Squarespace site at distinctivelandscapeandmaintenance.com has no blog, no schema markup, no social media integration, and 18 gallery images with zero alt text. You're using a Gmail address instead of a branded email, which undercuts the professional image a 35-year company should project. Your Google Business Profile has a perfect 5.0 rating -- but with only 1 review, that doesn't carry the weight it should.

Meanwhile, competitors like Chop Chop Landscaping have 20+ pages, FAQ sections, schema markup, and active content strategies. They're capturing the searches that should be going to a company with your track record. The good news: your BBB A+ rating, CSU Sacramento credentials, and three decades of work give you a credibility advantage that's easy to leverage once the digital foundation is in place.

assessment.title: Website Analysis -- distinctivelandscapeandmaintenance.com
points: Built on Squarespace -- limited SEO flexibility compared to WordPress.
Owner: Todd Young, licensed contractor, CSU Sacramento graduate.
Phone: (530) 342-5009 displayed on site.
Address: 10 Whitehall Pl, Chico, CA 95928.
Only 5 total pages on the site -- extremely thin content.
18 gallery images with zero alt text -- invisible to Google Images.
Using Gmail (distinctivelandscape1@gmail.com) instead of branded email.
Established 1990 -- 35+ years in business.

assessment.title: SEO & Visibility Gaps
points: Only 2 of 5 pages indexed by Google -- 60% of the site is invisible to search.
No blog or content marketing -- zero authority-building content.
No schema markup of any kind -- no LocalBusiness, no Service, no FAQ.
No social media links or integration on the website.
Anonymous reviews on the site -- no verified review platform integration.
No meta descriptions optimized for local search terms.
Google Business Profile has 5.0 stars but only 1 review.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Chop Chop Landscaping has 20+ pages with schema, FAQs, and active content -- significantly outperforming.
Barrows Landscaping (already in our analysis) has 11 service pages and multiple location pages.
Most landscaping competitors in Chico have at minimum a blog and Google review strategy.
Distinctive Landscape's 35-year track record is a huge differentiator -- but it's not reflected online.
BBB A+ rating and Yelp listing exist but aren't leveraged on the website.

findings.finding: Only 2 of 5 pages indexed -- 60% of site invisible to search
Zero schema markup -- no LocalBusiness, Service, or FAQ schema
No blog or content strategy -- zero authority-building pages
18 gallery images with zero alt text -- invisible to image search
Using Gmail instead of @distinctivelandscape domain email
No social media links or integration on site
5.0 stars but only 1 review -- needs review generation strategy
A+ rating exists but not displayed or leveraged on site

strategy.title: Phase 1: Foundation & Indexing Fix (Months 1-2)
actions: Fix Google indexing -- submit all 5 pages via Search Console and resolve crawl barriers.
Add LocalBusiness and Service schema markup across the site.
Write keyword-rich meta descriptions for every page targeting 'Chico landscaping' terms.
Add descriptive alt text to all 18 gallery images for Google Images visibility.
Set up branded email (todd@distinctivelandscape.com or similar).
Embed Google reviews and BBB badge on the homepage for trust signals.
Connect Google Business Profile to the website with proper linking.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content & Authority Building (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch a blog with monthly posts targeting local landscaping searches.
Create dedicated service pages: lawn maintenance, landscape design, irrigation, hardscaping.
Build service area pages for Chico, Paradise, Durham, Forest Ranch.
Implement a review solicitation strategy to grow Google reviews from 1 to 20+.
Set up and optimize social media profiles -- Facebook, Instagram (before/after project photos).
Build local citations across landscaping directories.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Growth & Market Dominance (Months 6-12)
actions: Evaluate platform migration from Squarespace to WordPress for better SEO control.
Launch Google Ads targeting emergency and seasonal landscaping searches.
Create before/after project galleries with full image SEO.
Video content showcasing 35 years of project work.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.
Email marketing for seasonal maintenance reminders to past clients.

pricingIntro: Distinctive Landscape has 35 years of credibility that competitors can't match -- but right now, that reputation is almost invisible online. With only 2 pages indexed, no blog, no schema, and no review strategy, you're essentially giving away search traffic to competitors with a fraction of your experience. The fixes here are foundational but high-impact -- getting your full site indexed and optimized would immediately change your visibility in Chico landscaping searches.

pricingTiers.name: STARTER
features: Google indexing fixes for all pages
Image alt text for all gallery photos

about: Ridge Cell Repair LLC is a California-based digital marketing and business analysis firm specializing in helping service-industry businesses grow their online presence and generate more leads. We focus on practical, results-driven strategies rather than flashy marketing that doesn't convert.
Our approach is data-first: we research your market, identify what your competitors are doing (and not doing), and build a strategy that delivers real business outcomes.
What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work -- no layers of account managers.
nextSteps: Todd, 35 years of work speaks for itself -- but Google needs help seeing it. Fixing the indexing issue alone would double your visible pages overnight, and adding schema, alt text, and reviews would put you in a completely different competitive position.
Free 30-minute strategy call -- reach me at (530) 786-3655 or reply to this email.
Let's make sure Distinctive Landscape shows up first when Chico residents search for landscaping help.
